entry.title: BW to BW/4HANA Sizing
entry.content:
Hi All - we are running SAP BW (NW 7.5 SPS27) system. The current Production database system size is 8.5 TB. We are planning to migrate on BW4HANA system, and we ran BW4HANA sizing report. We came to know there is no much significant database reduction in sizing report as the required database size is 8.2 TB for HANA DB. Is there any thumb rule when you migrate BW database which will be reduce by 30% on HANA DB? Pls confirm on this. 

Regards,

Charanjit

entry.title: Re: Performance based equipment task list with multiple i...
entry.content:
@TijsVanMechelen ,

yes, You can use same strategy for multiple equipment all with different hourly intervals.

The 2 digit mystery can be solved with below ideas:

1. Use Alphabets such as for 1000 Hours - 1K or AK

2. 1500 Hrs - 'OK' because 'O' is 15th alphabet of ABCD.

3. 5000 hrs - 5K

First Char -> Alphabet (you can go up to 26)
Second Char -> K

or use numbers till 9 and then use alphabets from 10 to 26.

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Sorting in Bank Statement Details
entry.content: I create in customer confluence today, thank you for your vote 🙂

entry.title: Re: In SAC System Overview--> Authorization Missing Options
entry.content: Not sure why I could not reply to the post, so I edited the original question with the screenshot.

entry.title: Re: Sorting in Bank Statement Details
entry.content: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/344647

entry.title: Re: Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI [...
entry.content: patch is out, it's in CF version 6.63.45, I tested it and it works fine for the async use case, for sync calls the response is still empty, I was told that there is another patch but at least for async you can use the generic inbound flow again, note that you need to redeploy you generic XI inbound so that a new Camel XML is generated

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP and oData v4 max items (or growing threshold...
entry.content:
Hello, thanks @Sapdreas  for the information. It is indeed possible to create controller extension with odata V4, it is just different to odataV2... We have to relearned everything 🙂 Anyway, I'm sorry because I should have updated my question, because I found out why my presentation variant was not taking into account (and so the max items too). You need to define the table as #PRESENTATIONVARIANT_REFERENCE instead of #LINEITEM_REFERENCE.

Then, in the presentation variant, you can specify that it is "line item" and it works !

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager Gis Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi @muhammad_rafay muhammad_rafay! From what you said, it is possible for enhance the Default search in the map and include in the Equipment and Order objects the related field functional location as image bellow? In this way, when i type in the search field the Functional location number SLZ-RED-001, it appears the functional location, equipments and orders. I would like to know if i could enhance as well when i select in the order a button View map (or a enhanced button), a service GET the functional location number of the order and POST in "SearchFields" of the map. Is this possible?

If i could enhance both this functionalities, my scenario would be as bellow:

View two functional location and some equipment of this functional location

 

Enter in the order of functional location SLZ-RED-001.

This functional location has 5 equipments intalled.

Select view map button

 

 

Automatically enter Seachfield the functional location number.

 

 

Filter only the objects that enconter in the search

Best Regards

Rafael Eij Umeda

entry.title: Re: EOIO in SAP CI Using JMS - Exclusive Mode
entry.content: @ToMi yes, this was a bug, a patch has been provided, can you check if your tenant is on CF version 6.63.45 already, I tested it and it works fine now, note that you need to redeploy your flow so that a new Camel XML is generated

entry.title: Re: Logic to get task list operations on the basis of equ...
entry.content:
Hello @Badalsatyam ,

Use below table relationship diagram. It will solve ur query.

Citation: https://erp.pics/1523/sap-eam-pm-task-lists-tables-data-relationships-diagram/

Vaibhav

entry.title: Issue with UploadSetwithTable - Unsupported Media Type (415) in RAP (S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on a RAP-based application in S/4HANA Public Cloud where I need to attach multiple files and upload them using the UploadSetwithTable control.

However, I am encountering the following error during upload:

Error Response:

{
"message": "The server is refusing to process the request because the entity has an unsupported format"
}

HTTP Status: 415 (Unsupported Media Type)

Implementation Details:-

My Fragment code: 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:f="sap.f" xmlns:upload="sap.m.upload">
   
    <Dialog id="uploadDialog" title="Upload File" draggable="true" resizable="true" contentWidth="50%" contentHeight="50%">
        <content>
            <Table id="table-uploadSet"
                inset="true"
                autoPopinMode="true"
                hiddenInPopin="None"
                items="{path: 'attachmentModel>/Attachment', templateShareable: false}">
                <headerToolbar>
                    <OverflowToolbar>
                        <Title text="Documents" level="H2" />
                        <ToolbarSpacer />
                        <ToolbarSeparator />
                        <upload:ActionsPlaceholder id="uploadButton" placeholderFor="UploadButtonPlaceholder" />
                    </OverflowToolbar>
                </headerToolbar>

                <dependents>
                    <plugins.UploadSetwithTable
                        id="uploadSet"
                        uploadUrl="/path"
                        multiple="true"
                        beforeUploadStarts=".onBeforeUploadStarts"
                        uploadCompleted=".onUploadCompleted"
                        cloudFilePickerEnabled="true"
                        actions="uploadButton">
                        <rowConfiguration>
                            <upload.UploadItemConfiguration
                                fileNamePath="Filename"
                                mediaTypePath="Mimetype"
                                urlPath="url"
                                previewablePath="previewable"
                                fileSizePath="fileSize"
                                isTrustedSourcePath="trustedSource"/>
                        </rowConfiguration>
                    </plugins.UploadSetwithTable>
                </dependents>

                <columns>
                    <Column id="fileName" importance="High">
                        <header>
                            <Label text="File Name" />
                        </header>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="actionButton" importance="High" />
                </columns>  

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem>
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{attachmentModel>Filename}" />
                            <Button type="Transparent" icon="sap-icon://decline" press="onRemoveHandler"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                </items>
            </Table>
        </content>
        <endButton>
            <Button text="Close" type="Transparent" press="onCloseFileUploadDialog"/>
        </endButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Controller code: 

onBeforeUploadStarts: function (oEvent) {
            var oUploadSet = oEvent.getSource();           
            var oItem = oEvent.getParameter("item"); // Get the item inside mParameters

            var oModel = this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch");
            var csrfToken = oModel.getHttpHeaders()["X-CSRF-Token"];
 
            var sContentType = oItem.getMediaType() || "application/octet-stream";
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "x-csrf-token", text: csrfToken })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "slug", text: oItem.getFileName() })
            );
            oItem.addHeaderField(
                new sap.ui.core.Item({ key: "Content-Type", text: sContentType  })
            );
},
onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
            var iResponseStatus = oEvent.getParameter("status");
       
            if (iResponseStatus === 201) {  // Check if upload is successful
                this.getView().getModel("zmm_sd_pr_atch").refresh(true);
                MessageToast.show("Document Added Successfully");
            } else {
                MessageToast.show("File upload failed.");
            }
        },
 

Any guidance on proper request formatting would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

BR,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: Launchpad Error - No Descriptor was found
entry.content:
Try this

You will find this in error, copy past like above it will pass in green

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to add couple more things I`d recommend to try. Decluttering diagrams (recommended by George and Chris) is one of them. Choosing empty (or very small) diagram as default diagram is another. After that I would try these:

  • Do you have similar response times when opening/saving these models on different computers (=different PD installations)?
  • I don`t have very good experience using virtual computers (however powerful they are) for more "difficult" PD operations. Can you try it on good old physical PC?
  • Are there any other models opened in the same PD instance? I am asking because of inter-model relationships.
  • Some PD versions in the past had trouble handling views with recursive SQL query in it? Do you have such objects (Views, Procedures) in your model?
  • Can you try running PD using pdlegacyshell16.exe instead of standard pdshell16.exe?
  • Can you try saving your model using "Save as new model"?
  • Do you use any "special" extensions (or definition file modification) attached to those models? Something like event handlers on the model level, some heavy calculations,... (it is really not common to open 1 MB model in 40 minutes, or even 22 MB model in 2 minutes). I once had 200 MB model and it took me 1 minute to open it.

Answering these questions could move us closer to the potential cause of the malfunctioning.

Regards,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: EORI number into eDocument
entry.content:
Dear All,

we are working for italian customer and it needs to fill the EORI number into xml tag <CodEORI> 1.2.1.3.5.

Please, could you suggest me how to insert this code for each comapny code?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Document and Reporting Compliance 

Thanks and regards

entry.title: Re: Test Sequences with Focused Build Test Steps
entry.content:
To anyone having the same problem with the visibility of the result attributes in test sequences:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3341798/E

This note helped in our case.

KR,

Michael

entry.title: Transaccion goods receipt vs invoice receipt
entry.content: I need a report where I see the POs that have Good Receipt but do not have Invoice Receipt or any imbalance (AccM for example) Any transaction or idea that you recommend?

entry.title: Re: BW to BW/4HANA Sizing
entry.content:
All information regarding this subject is on this SAP note: 2610534 - HANA BW Sizing Report (/SDF/HANA_BW_SIZING) - SAP for Me.

Pay special attention to item 15 (Is there a sizing difference between BW on HANA and BW/4HANA?):

If you are already on BW on HANA and you are migrating to BW/4HANA:

To see the exact uplift when migrating from BW on HANA to BW/4HANA sizing, 
run the sizing report with and without the BW/4HANA flag and compare the results in these two reports.

Note: If there is a substantial amount of data sitting in InfoCubes, 
you will see a noticeable increase of the overall sizing for BW/4HANA.

entry.title: How to promote a S-user to Super Admin?
entry.content:
Hi,

How can I promote a S-user to Super Admin?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to promote a S-user to Super Admin?
entry.content:
Hello,

Regarding the request of promoting a S-user to Super Administrator, it is necessary to contact an available Super Administrator of the company, and request the admin to provide the required authorizations to the S-user, as per KBA 1511008 - How to add or change S-user ID authorizations - SAP for Me.

To make this process easier, the KBA 1614304 - How to use the Copy Authorization feature for S-user IDs - SAP for Me can be followed, providing all necessary information to copy all authorization in one time.

Thank you,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SCC4 - Refresh of development system from a productio...
entry.content:
When there are differences like that between 2 systems, means that the DEV system have some SAP notes corrections or manual modification done by a DEVELOPER.

The client copy tool have functionality to compare the 2 systems and highlight the differences. Then you can choose to exclude some tables from the copy to avoid those errors.

Raj

Document Information Extraction team

Thorsten

entry.title: GRC, Trade and Tax with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm thrilled to share an update regarding our latest release - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 for GRC, Trade, and Tax. This update highlights many significant innovations from SAP Risk and Assurance Management, SAP Watch List Screening, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, as well as SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance.

For a quick overview of the top release highlights for GRC with 2502, you can watch my video. If you're interested in a complete overview of all release highlights, scroll down to the table of contents.

 

 

This blog covers the following innovations:

SAP Risk and Assurance Management

  • Qualitative Risk Management Capabilities
  • Comprehensive Customer-Specific Reporting
  • Enabling Manual Procedures: Offline Execution

SAP Watch List Screening

  • Custom Watch List - Uploading of Custom Watch List Content
  • Unified SAP Fiori Apps and Process Optimization

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

  • Receiving Electronic Invoices From Suppliers By E-Mail (Germany)
  • Migration of Online Submission to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance

  • Extended Access Governance: Support for Additional Authorization in SAP BTP
  • Automatic Deprovisioning for Expired Business Role Assignments
  • Additional Risk Details in the Approver View Through a More Extensive Risk Perspective

 

SAP Risk and Assurance Management

Qualitative Risk Management Capabilities

The GRC Risk service offers a risk management solution with capabilities including risk documentation, risk analysis, and tracking of risk treatments. In addition to the existing quantitative risk analysis, it is now also possible to perform a qualitative risk analysis.

Value Proposition

  • Simple and quick - Enable users to assess risks without using precise numbers to determine impact or probability
  • Easy to perform and doesn‘t require expertise or training
  • Encourages collaboration and input from various stakeholders
  • Can be adapted to a wide range of industries and scenarios

Capabilities

  • Addition of qualitative risk assessment to the quantitative method
  • Qualitative risk assessment is a non-numerical approach to evaluating risks
  • Identify and prioritize risks based on their likelihood of occurring and the severity of their impact, using descriptive categories like low, medium, or high
  • Unified scoring to represent severity of risks regardless of quantitative or qualitative assessment approach to ensure comparability of assessment outcomes

 

Video 2: In addition to the existing quantitative risk analysis, it is now also possible to perform a qualitative risk analysis in SAP Risk and Assurance Management

For more information, see: Risk Analysis

Back to top

 

Comprehensive Customer-Specific Reporting

SAP Risk and Assurance Management supports comprehensive customer-specific reporting by making consolidated data available for reporting tools such as SAP Analytics Cloud.

This enables customers to analyze and visualize aspects like Number of Issues by Control over a Certain Time Period. 

Value Proposition

  • Analyze data related to different business objects to get deeper insights.
  • Optimized for reporting purposes.
  • Easy to use and simple to configure.

Capabilities

  • Consistent and consolidated data.
  • Provided via OData interface.
  • Consumable by third-party analytical solutions.

Fig. 1: SAP Risk and Assurance Management supports comprehensive customer-specific reporting

For more information, see: GRC Data Consolidation Service

Back to top

 

Enabling Manual Procedures: Offline Execution

Manual procedures can now be performed offline by procedure owners, meaning that they can be completed wherever they are needed. A template is available for download in the Offline Assigned Manual Procedures app which can then be distributed by compliance managers via email to all relevant people.

Value Proposition

  • Complete manual procedures anywhere, with or without an internet connection.
  • Aggregate data collected by several procedure owners in one place.
  • Leverage familiar tools like spreadsheets for greater ease of use.
  • Share templates with occasional business users in supported languages with minimal administration.

Capabilities 

  • Templates support fast and easy to use manual procedures to ensure that no time is lost.
  • Distribution of templates by compliance managers enables procedure owners to focus on the task at hand with minimal administrative effort.
  • Ability to perform manual procedures offline ensures maximum flexibility.
  • Enables compliance managers to have a better overview of collected data and ongoing tasks.

Fig. 2: In SAP Risk and Assurance Management, manual procedures can now be performed offline by procedure owners

For more information, see: Perform Offline-Assigned Manual Procedures

Back to top

 

SAP Watch List Screening

Custom Watch List - Uploading of Custom Watch List Content

If you wish to use a custom watch list for screening, instead of or additionally to the watch list provided by SAP, you can now use the Watch List API.
To select the watch lists that should be used for screening, you can use the new app Configure Watch List Screening.

Value Proposition

  • Use a custom watch list for screening

Capabilities

  • Replace the provided watch list or use the custom watch list as supplement

Video 3: With SAP Watch List Screening, it is now possible to use custom watch lists in addition to or as a replacement

For more information, see the Administration Guide:  Watch List API (optional)

Back to top

 

Unified SAP Fiori Apps and Process Optimization

You can now use a new app for ad hoc screening, a new app for reviewing screening hits and a new app for managing automatic screening decisions. The new apps have been designed to enhance your experience with more robust features, a streamlined interface and context-sensitive help. The new apps will eventually replace the old apps.

Value Proposition

  • More robust features
  • Streamlined interface

Capabilities 

  • Context-sensitive help

Fig. 3: SAP Watch List Screening now offers three new apps: one for ad hoc screening, one for reviewing screening hits and one for managing automatic screening decisions.

For more information, see: 

  • Ad Hoc Screening
  • Review Screening Hits
  • Manage Automatic Screening Decisions

Back to top

 

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

Receiving Electronic Invoices From Suppliers By E-Mail (Germany)

SAP Document and Reporting Compliance offers a process to validate electronic documents sent to you by your suppliers by e-mail to ensure they meet the European standard EN16931. You can use this process to comply with the new German regulation to be technically capable of receiving electronic invoices as of January 1, 2025.

When you receive electronic invoices or credit notes from your supplier by e-mail, you can upload the extracted electronic invoices (XML file) and create electronic documents for them in the Manage Electronic Documents app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. You can then validate them and display them in HTML format using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition.

In addition, you can use SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management to automatically extract and upload the XML from the received email. The validation in the cloud edition can be automated as well as the posting of the supplier invoice for further processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Value Proposition

  • Ensure compliance with the new German regulation to be able to receive invoices from suppliers electronically.
  • Ensure compliance with the German electronic invoicing standards:
  • XRechnung standard using the Cross Industry Invoice (UN/CEFACT) syntax.
  • XRechnung standard using the UBL Invoice or UBL Credit Note syntax.

Capabilities

  • Upload supplier invoices extracted from emails you receive from your supplier to the Manage Electronic Documents app
  • Creation of electronic documents for the supplier invoices in the Manage Electronic Documents app
  • Validation of electronic documents using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition
  • Display of supplier invoices in HTML format
  • Integration with incoming automation solution such as SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management

Fig. 4: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance allows you to validate electronic documents sent to you by your suppliers by e-mail to ensure they meet the European standard EN16931

For more information, see: Electronic Supplier Invoices (Receipt by E-Mail)

Back to top

 

Migration of Online Submission to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

In some countries/regions, you can submit your statutory reports electronically by using the web services provided by the respective government agencies. The end-to-end process of submitting statutory reports electronically to the authorities requires that you integrate your system with the service that actually transmits the statutory report electronically. This direct submission feature was supported via SAP Document and Reporting Compliance service and is now migrated to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition.

Value Proposition

  • One single channel for all submissions across countries and processes
  • Simplify IT landscape and reduce total cost of ownership
  • Manage your integrations to tax authorities within your global SAP BTP account

Capabilities 

  • Centralized hub for all submissions to authorities, including reports and other requirements (e.g. HCM)
  • Standardized integration between SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition introduced with scope item 78L. One connection across countries and scenarios

Fig. 5: The direct electronic submission feature for statutory reports has been migrated to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

For more information, see: Submitting Statutory Reports Using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition

Back to top

 

SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance

Extended Access Governance: Support for Additional Authorization in SAP BTP

The SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance application enables comprehensive risk assessment of permission-level authorization data by extracting BTP roles and scopes, while also providing the capability to define rules.

Value Proposition

  • Empowers organizations to enhance security and compliance by enabling precise risk assessments at the permission level
  • Improved operational efficiency, reduced risk exposure, and strengthened trust in enterprise access management processes

Capabilities 

  • Define rules at BTP roles as action and scopes as permissions
  • Execute risk assessment at granular permission-level authorization data

Fig. 5: SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance enables comprehensive risk assessment of permission-level authorization data by extracting BTP roles and scopes

For more information, see: SAP Busines Technology Platform - Cloud Foundry | SAP Help Portal

Back to top

 

Automatic Deprovisioning for Expired Business Role Assignments

Implementing an efficient process to automatically deprovision expired roles eliminates the need for manual review and identification of expired assignments. This automation ensures that relevant audit information is consistently updated to accurately reflect changes in role assignments, supporting compliance and streamlined access management.

Value Proposition

  • Streamline the Deprovisioning Process: Utilize the "Deprovision Expired Business Role Assignments" job to automate the identification and removal of expired business role assignments, eliminating the need for manual review.
  • Enhance Access Control: Ensure that users are promptly removed from roles they no longer need or are unauthorized to access, helping maintain strict access compliance.
  • Maintain Accurate Audit Trails: Automatically update audit logs and the "Business Role User Assigned" tab to reflect the deprovisioning of roles, ensuring a clear record of changes for compliance and review purposes.

Capabilities 

  • Administrators can now automate the removal of expired business role assignments by scheduling the "Deprovision Expired Business Role Assignments" job through the Job Scheduler app.

Fig. 7: SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance enables automatic deprovisioning for expired business role assignments

For more information, see: Help Document: Deprovision Expired Business Role Assignments

Back to top

 

Additional Risk Details in the Approver View Through a More Extensive Risk Perspective

An improved inbox view for approvers in the Access Request app, offering a more extensive risk perspective with additional details on risk factors, functions, actions, and authorization objects related to access.

Value Proposition

  • Equip approvers with comprehensive insights into risks, actions, and permissions that contribute to elevated access risks for users.

Capabilities 

  • More-extensive risk information, including additional information concerning risk factors, functions, actions, and authorization objects associated with access for the Access Approver view

Fig. 8: In SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance, the inbox view for approvers in the Access Request app has been improved

For more information, see: Help Document: Access Request - Detailed Risk View

Back to top

 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X.

 

 

More innovation can be found in the What's new viewer

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 

The Future of Business, Today: Get Your Access to AI-Assisted Features Thanks to this Limited Promotion Now! 

The 2502 update is a strategic investment that combines advanced AI with powerful enterprise management tools. Whether scaling your business, enhancing productivity, or building sustainable operations, its capabilities help support a more agile and resilient future.

Sign up for following features through the limited Promotion for AI-assisted Features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (for all countries, customers, and partners):

  • The easy filter and smart summarization features in SAP Fiori allow for efficient, natural language filtering of business data and seamless summarization capabilities, enabling users to quickly extract relevant information and jump-start subsequent collaboration. 
  • Facilitate easier understanding and interpretation of financial data with insights from cost center reviews and explanations of fixed-asset depreciation keys.

 

 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.

 

 

 Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:   

 

 

 

  

 

Link: https://chart-bdmaicr0au.dispatcher.eu2.hana.ondemand.com/index.html?hc_reset

entry.title: Error during request to remote service: ran into a timeout after 60000ms.
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I have this error when I try to retrieve data from SAP Backend to SAP CAP.

Error during request to remote service: Request to URL: http://<host> ran into a timeout after 60000ms.

I use timeout and I increase this param to 300000, but the request is not take this value.

I apply the param requestTimeout, this is taked but I have a another error.

And the same time, I noticed the connection is closed before 5 min.

 

Best regard,

Angel Gutierrez

entry.title: Re: How to get list of model versions information in Powe...
entry.content:
Hi,

I believe, you could get these information by direct SQL query too, but I don`t think it is necessary. Instead I recommend using one of the sample VB scripts already present in PD installation, which is using PD API and browses through all the repository documents/models.

You can type almost all information (except for model creator) into the output window. Here is the script. I made only small modifications to alter the output according to your needs.

Option explicit

' Check the repository connection
Dim repository, connected
Set repository = RepositoryConnection
connected = repository.Connected
If not connected then
   connected = repository.Open()
End If
   
If connected then
   ScanRepository repository
   repository.Refresh
Else
   ' Log message
   MsgBox "The repository needs to be connected or default connexion should be operational"
End If

' The recursive procedure that scan folders and extracts models
Sub ScanRepository (folder)
   ' check the parameters
   If folder is Nothing then
      Exit Sub
   End If
   
   ' Log message in the output
   output "Scanning the folder " + folder.Name
      
   ' Recursive call on sub folders
   Dim subObject
   For Each subObject in folder.ChildObjects
      ' recurse or extract repository sub-package
      If subObject.IsKindOf(PdRMG.Cls_RepositoryFolder) then
         ScanRepository subObject
      else
         If subObject.IsKindOf(PdRMG.Cls_RepositoryDocument) or subObject.IsKindOf(PdRMG.Cls_RepositoryModel) then
            output subObject.Location + " - " + subObject.Name + " - " + CStr(subOBject.Version) + " *** " + CStr(subObject.CreationDateInRepository) + " *** " + subObject.VersionComment
         end if
      End If
   Next
End Sub

HTH,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content:
And the questions continue...

I just noticed that you mention you are on a virtual workstation.  When PD opens a model, memory is allocated as the model opens.  That memory is allocated by Windows.  If this workstation is a virtual guest, then the host has to get involved (with all the other overhead of virtualization).

Have you been able to test the load performance on dedicated hardware?

Chris

entry.title: SAP RAP - ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on an SAP RAP-based development and encountering an ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT' when executing a button action.

The button requires a parameter input, and when I enter a value and click the button, the error occurs.

Inside my class, I am calling another class where I use BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT and BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK. However, I receive the following error message:

Error Message:

Statement "ROLLBACK WORK" is not allowed with this status.

It seems that calling COMMIT WORK or ROLLBACK WORK directly is restricted within the transactional context of RAP.

How can I handle transactional BAPI calls properly within RAP without triggering this error?

Thanks in advance!


errorInformation code line:

entry.title: Re: F4 Help for Document Number
entry.content:
There's no search help for BKPF-BELNR (or BSIK-BELNR or whatever table you want).

Instead, you may reuse the concept used in transactions like FB03, with the button "Document List" to run the Document List program RFBUEB00 to select documents and run one transaction code for this selected document (here, it will run FB03):

Type the selection criteria:

The corresponding documents are shown, select one:

The transaction code FB03 is started (again) with the selected document and its detail screen is shown immediately:

For information, if you go back, the list of selected documents is shown again.

Of course, it's not like a search help because the selected document is not returned to the screen field where the search help is invoked.

BUT you may do this little workaround:

  1. Create a custom search help which runs RFBUEB00 with a dummy transaction code which just displays a popup with this message: "The document has been selected, go back to the screen where you invoked the search help."
  2. After RFBUEB00, read the selected document number (GET PARAMETER ID 'BUK', 'GJR' and one among 'BLD', 'BLM', 'BLV' or 'BLN' depending on BKPF-BSTAT = 'D', 'M', 'V' or other (*)) and return it to the screen field where the search help is invoked.

(*) The logic is coded in the subroutine SET_PIDS of RFBUEB00:

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content: To clarify - when working with a model, it may be fine for a workstation to be virtualized (the guest can be swapped by the host during 'think times') since the model is already loaded, but for loading, I would recommend 1:1 mapping for CPU and memory to the host (just like a server - which is always busy),

entry.title: Re: Inquiry : Learning Hub order process pending over a week
entry.content:
Hi @HariGK 
Please check your ticket for the latest status.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to implement additional restrictions for users creating Sales Orders
entry.content: Great description for this theme. Thanks 🙂

entry.title: Business Application Studio - modules not recognized anymore in typescript/javascript files
entry.content:
Hello,

Since few days, in all typescript/javascript files of all projects, links to module (import or require) are broken. By consequence, there is no syntax check or auto completion anymore. However, the projects still works perfectly so I suppose it's about some configuration in Business Application Studio.

This issue appeared right after the activation of Joule. I'm not sure if it's linked or not.

I tested the same projects in VSCode and all works fine.

To be sure, I created a new dev space in BAS and started a new CAP project from template and I have the same behavior.

Example:

This is my implementation in x-service.ts file.

  • xxxxx does not exist however I don't have any syntax check (red highlighted error)
  • when I do ctrl + click on @SAP/cds nothing happen
  • when I do ctrl + click on ./element I get "file not found" despite the file exists
import cds from '@sap/cds';
import { Service } from '@sap/cds';
import { xxxxxx } from '#cds-models/XService'
import Element from './element';

export default (srv: Service) => {

}
 

This is my x-service.cds file.

service XService {
    entity Stuff {
        name: String;
    }
}
 

This is the element.ts file:

export default class Element {
    
}
 

If I remove the faulty xxxxx import and I start the project everything works fine.
But it's annoying when you have a big project to work without auto completion and syntax check.

What's wrong ? Did you face the same issue ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Reassignment Program - Funds Management
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a scenario where  purchase requisitions, purchase orders, GR/IR postings with FM account assignment fund, funded program, fund center and commitment item. The business requirement is to change the FM account assignment Fund and funded program for the open PR,PO and GR/IR documents during the year (not at year end) .

i have created the derivation rule in the FMDERIVE transaction with below rule values:

NOTE: I have not done any customization in FMYC.

Fund A (OLD) = Fund B (NEW)

Funded Program X (OLD) = Funded Program Y(NEW)

and executed the reassignment program with below steps;

1. FMCN

2.FMCT

But while executing the reassignment program system is not converting the documents as per the requirement ( unable to fetch the sender fund and funded program ).

NOTE: We are deriving funded program with WBS element with function module and purchasing documents are created with account assignment category P.

Please let me know if i am missing anything.

Regards,

Asif Ali

entry.title: Re: How to define multiple to parent associations in RAP?
entry.content:
do you really have to go with composition?

why not association?

entry.title: Re: Assertion Faileure 201503
entry.content: Just to confirm, there are no backups that are healthy that can be used as a starting point for a recovery? Are you able to restart the database without the transaction log (try starting with -f on a copy of the database)?

entry.title: [RCM-142198] - 1H 2025 Release - Enhanced Application Data Download - Permissions
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

I have the following question on the Enhanced Application Data Download [RCM-142198] feature delivered with the 1H 2025 release for the Partner Q&A session. Exporting candidate PII data from the SuccessFactors instance removes this data from the access control and the DRTM measures established in SuccessFactors. Therefore, this is a risk for data privacy and compliance. To prevent GDPR violations:
- how can this feature be deactivated completely? 
- how can this feature be restricted to be available only to a restricted set of users?

Kind regards

Roman

entry.title: Re: EWM PGI for set of outbound deliveries with same Rout...
entry.content: When the standard transaction VL06G is there to cater your requirement, not sure, whether you explored this

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP - ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT
entry.content: how about just removing those commit/rollback call?

entry.title: Re: Access Error in HANA CV - DBTech JDBC: [258]: insufficient privilege: [2950] user is not authori
entry.content:
Hi together, 

please select by Apply Privileges --> "Classical Analytic Privileges" 

 

BR, Michael

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content:
You can create a single default diagram that provides links to the other diagrams. This diagram contains links to seven other diagrams (double-click an icon to open the diagram) - to create these icons, just drag them onto your diagram from the browser.

I changed the image for six of the diagrams - right-click an icon and select Change Image.

entry.title: Re: Cannot read property 'businessPartner' of undefined
entry.content: Is solved

entry.title: Calibration vs 9-box Matrix Grid
entry.content:
Hi Community,
We are looking for a customer-facing Calibration and 9-box matrix document that describes the general process of calibration vs 9-box matrix grid without getting overly technical. Be great to have examples. 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP S/4 Public Cloud - Post Incoming Payment Integration
entry.content:
Dear All

We have generated 1000s of bills by integrating POS with SAP SD Module. Now there is a requirement to post incoming payments against billing in the background either using Business Object Interface or by calling API.

Within api.sap.com, we are getting only below options

  1. SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Customer Payments API ( To use these APIs, you must have the licensing for the product SAP S4/HANA Cloud for customer payments ). 
  2. Business Object Interface - I_JOURNALENTRYTP

Both of the options are not looking feasible to post and clear incoming payments of bills generated against delivery documents within SD Module..

Is there any alternate to automate the incoming payments within SAP Public Cloud by using Billing Documents generated within SAP Public Cloud - SD Module.

entry.title: Re: Configuring BTP Destination in Advanced Event Mesh fo...
entry.content: Hi Willem, we are facing a weird problem; while using the first approach (i.e. REST call from AEM to CAP endpoint). Although the request comes fine in CAP, I can see my breakpoint being hit but the actual payload is not available in the request body. is there some special config for that?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry : Learning Hub order process pending over a week
entry.content: Thank you, Margit! I received a response this morning and going to resubmit the order.

entry.title: Expanded navigation property is alway null when using drafts
entry.content:
Hi,

I have this CDS model.

entity ApiEntities : cuid {
    api  : Association to Apis;
    type : Association to ApiEntityTypes;
}

entity ApiEntityTypes : cuid {
    api         : Association to Apis;
}

entity Apis : cuid {
    apiEntities     : Composition of many ApiEntities
                          on apiEntities.api = $self;
    apiEntityTypes  : Composition of many ApiEntityTypes
                          on apiEntityTypes.api = $self;
}

I added this annotation to enable drafts.

annotate service.Apis with @(odata.draft.enabled);

Then i created all of those entities as drafts.

POST /Apis
{
	"IsActiveEntity": false
}
POST /ApiEntityTypes
{
	"IsActiveEntity": false,
	"api_ID": "1798c58c-a5cf-47f1-a063-61cf5a5dee65"
}
POST /ApiEntities
{
	"IsActiveEntity": false,
	"api_ID": "1798c58c-a5cf-47f1-a063-61cf5a5dee65",
	"type_ID": "5402f265-af8f-4c4f-b04e-af4a68719d7f"
}

Now i want to expand type in ApiEntity but "type" is always null. Is this intended?

GET /ApiEntities?$expand=type
{
	"@context": "$metadata#ApiEntities(type())/$entity",
	"@metadataEtag": "W/\"0a468f163ee40f0e57c70e0ef1a9501919bd6af288e112a6bbe498346e97f613\"",
	"ID": "447dfabf-2ace-438a-bb11-2dcd47bab912",
	"api_ID": "1798c58c-a5cf-47f1-a063-61cf5a5dee65",
	"type_ID": "5402f265-af8f-4c4f-b04e-af4a68719d7f",
	"IsActiveEntity": false,
	"HasActiveEntity": false,
	"HasDraftEntity": false,
	"type": null,
	"DraftAdministrativeData": {
		"DraftUUID": "38ff890b-467c-436e-a8af-1de522705c1d",
		"CreationDateTime": null,
		"CreatedByUser": null,
		"DraftIsCreatedByMe": null,
		"LastChangeDateTime": null,
		"LastChangedByUser": null,
		"InProcessByUser": null,
		"DraftIsProcessedByMe": null
	}
}

If I activate this draft Apis object and call /ApiEntities?$expand=type again, then expand works.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Management Service (DMS) repository with file pick
entry.content:
Hi @mingkho,

Very interesting. Just curious: how would you go about picking multiple files simultaneously and post them using the same "HTTP destination request"?

Thanks.

LM.

entry.title: Create recurring pay component of same type using business rules
entry.content:
Hi

  I have a requirement to create multiple non recurring payment ie for every year till they are in a particular location. The years can be more than 10 also, so I believe it is not recommended to write the logic in Business rule. So, is there a way to achieve it.

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Re: Incorrect Cost (FIFO) When Returning
entry.content: Hi Matija. You are correct. The decimals difference caused this rounding issue. I thought it could be something else, but after testing same scenario using same decimals for amount and price, the calculation was correct. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Past 1 week fr 17-Mar-2025 i am waiting for my SAP Le...
entry.content: Hi All, Received last email response from SAP STORE ADMIN Support Team member on 26-Mar-2025 informing my ticket (SAP Store ID: 0002216077) is under process and i will be informed once done. My request is that the deadline for certification assessment date is 31-Mar-2025 and it is only 3 days more to go. Hope the SAP STORE ADMIN team will expedite processing of my ticket before the deadline date of 31-Mar-2025. Thank you, Meganathan.

entry.title: Conditionally send a standard event from SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud to BTP Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am exploring the event mesh functionality on BTP Cloud Integration Suite. My scenarios is when a sales order item delivery date is changed, I need to send an event to BTP Event Mesh. I know standard event topic 'sap/s4/beh/salesorder/v1/SalesOrder/ItemChanged/v1' is available but it is sent for any change on sales order item. I think this cannot be achieved with mere filtering by any properties.

Is there any way I can influence the event publish from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to send only in case of change to delivery date if sales order item?

If not, the event consumer has to call s/4hana cloud api to get the sales order detail. In this case how can we know that delivery date has changed and not any other fields?

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: req.user.id does not give me my user email id from SAP Build Workzone tile.
entry.content: @MioYasutake  Once the SAP CAPM application is deployed. I am using the test-srv, xsuaa credentials bound for the same and creating a destination in the SAP BTP subaccount under the Destinations tab. This is being authenticated via destination with bound XSUAA credentials.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Management Service (DMS) repository with file pick
entry.content:
Hi @Ludovic_MOOS , 

You can loop through the files array by repeating the logic flows while keeping track of the filesCount in a page variable, for example, and for each file, you post them via the "HTTP destination request".

However, if you need to send multiple files in just 1 multipart/form-data POST request (i.e. in a single "HTTP destination request"), then it's unfortunately not yet supported.

Regards

Ming

entry.title: Custom Fields Not Updating in BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
I am currently working on a project where I need to update custom fields in a purchase order using the BAPI_PO_CHANGE function module. Despite my efforts, the custom fields isdind and branch in the EKKO table are not updating as expected. Below is the code I am using:

 

DATA: p_ebeln        TYPE ekko-ebeln,
      po_items       TYPE TABLE OF bapimepoitem,
      i_bapi_return  TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2,
      wa_header_data TYPE bapiekko,
      lt_extensionin TYPE TABLE OF bapiparex,
      ls_extensionin TYPE bapiparex,
      bapi_te_po     TYPE bapi_te_mepoheader,
      bapi_te_pox    TYPE bapi_te_mepoheaderx,
      lv_isdind      TYPE bapi_te_mepoheader-isdind.

DATA: lt_final       TYPE TABLE OF  ztglint012,
      ls_final       TYPE           ztglint012,
      lt_ekko        TYPE TABLE OF  ekko,
      ls_ekko        TYPE           ekko,
      lt_ekpo        TYPE TABLE OF  ekpo,
      ls_ekpo        TYPE           ekpo,
      po_item        TYPE TABLE OF  bapimepoitem,
      ls_po_item     TYPE           bapimepoitem,
      po_schedule    TYPE  TABLE OF bapimeposchedule,
      ls_po_schedule TYPE           bapimeposchedule,
      po_acc         TYPE TABLE OF  bapimepoaccount,
      ls_po_acc      TYPE           bapimepoaccount,
      po_services    TYPE TABLE OF  bapiesllc,
      ls_po_services TYPE           bapiesllc,
      lv_delivery_dt TYPE           sy-datum,
      lv_del_st_dt   TYPE           sy-datum,
      lv_del_ed_dt   TYPE           sy-datum,
      lv_count       TYPE           i,
      lv_packno      TYPE           packno.

DATA: po_itemx       TYPE TABLE OF bapimepoitemx,
      ls_po_itemx    TYPE           bapimepoitemx,
      po_schedx      TYPE TABLE OF bapimeposchedulx,
      ls_po_schedx   TYPE           bapimeposchedulx.

p_ebeln = '3320000061'. 

" Call the BAPI to get PO details
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL1'
  EXPORTING
    purchaseorder = p_ebeln
    services      = 'X'
  TABLES
    poitem        = po_item
    poschedule    = po_schedule
    poaccount     = po_acc
    poservices    = po_services.

" Check for errors
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  LOOP AT i_bapi_return INTO DATA(ls_return).
    IF ls_return-type = 'E'.
      WRITE: / 'Error:', ls_return-message.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDIF.

DATA: ld_ponumber   TYPE ebeln,
      lt_return     TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2,
      it_extension  TYPE TABLE OF bapiparex,
      ext_container TYPE bapiparex.

ld_ponumber = '3320000061'. 

CLEAR it_extension[].

* Fill the custom fields for header
*bapi_te_po-po_number = ld_ponumber.
bapi_te_po-isdind = 'X'. " lv_isdind
bapi_te_po-branch = 'MAH'. " lv_branch

*bapi_te_pox-po_number = ld_ponumber.
bapi_te_pox-isdind = 'X'.
bapi_te_pox-branch = 'X'.

ext_container-structure = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER'.
cl_abap_container_utilities=>fill_container_c(
  EXPORTING
    im_value    = bapi_te_po
  IMPORTING
    ex_container = ext_container+30 ).
APPEND ext_container TO it_extension.

ext_container-structure = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADERX'.
cl_abap_container_utilities=>fill_container_c(
  EXPORTING
    im_value    = bapi_te_pox
  IMPORTING
    ex_container = ext_container+30 ).
APPEND ext_container TO it_extension.

* Populate POITEMX and POSCHEDULEX
LOOP AT po_item INTO ls_po_item.
  ls_po_itemx-po_item = ls_po_item-po_item.
  ls_po_itemx-quantity = 'X'. " Example field
  APPEND ls_po_itemx TO po_itemx.
ENDLOOP.

LOOP AT po_schedule INTO ls_po_schedule.
  ls_po_schedx-po_item = ls_po_schedule-po_item.
  ls_po_schedx-sched_line = ls_po_schedule-sched_line.

  IF ls_po_schedule-po_item IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-po_item = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-sched_line IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-sched_line = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-del_datcat_ext IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-del_datcat_ext = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-delivery_date IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-delivery_date = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-quantity IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-quantity = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-deliv_time IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-deliv_time = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-stat_date IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-stat_date = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-preq_item IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-preq_item = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  IF ls_po_schedule-po_date IS NOT INITIAL.
    ls_po_schedx-po_date = 'X'.
  ENDIF.
  APPEND ls_po_schedx TO po_schedx.
ENDLOOP.

* Call the BAPI to update the purchase order
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING
    purchaseorder = ld_ponumber
  TABLES
    return        = lt_return
    poitem        = po_item
    poitemx       = po_itemx
*    poschedule    = po_schedule
*    poschedx      = po_schedx
    poaccount     = po_acc
    poservices    = po_services
    extensionin   = it_extension.

* Commit the changes
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
  EXPORTING
    wait = 'X'.

entry.title: I have no access to download software for database ASE 16.1
entry.content:
I have access to the SAP ASE 16.1 download folder but there are no files to be downloaded.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: I have no access to download software for database AS...
entry.content: The ASE 16.1 version is not available for BS/ASE yet. You may refer to the Targeted ASE 16.x Release Schedule and CR list Information on the SAP Help Portal for more information. Additionally, you can also refer to KBA 3386206 - Which is the current latest ASE version? on SAP ASE for the latest information on available versions.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 Public Cloud - Post Incoming Payment Integration
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

Have you tried the Manage Automatic Payments app ?

This allows you to post and clear at the same time.

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Function module parameter not found
entry.content:
I have an odd situation with an Export parameter not being found in my include.

Here's the function declaration;

function z_ca_get_cluster.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*" IMPORTING
*" VALUE(IM_PROVIDER) TYPE ZCADEPARTMENT OPTIONAL
*" VALUE(IM_SUBPROVIDER) TYPE ZCASUBDEPT OPTIONAL
*" EXPORTING
*" REFERENCE(EX_FILE) TYPE FILE_TABLE. <--- Problem parameter
*" REFERENCE(EX_CLUSTERID) <--- Also not found
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------

clear: gt_recover.

Here's the includes;

*******************************************************************
* System-defined Include-files. *
*******************************************************************
include lzcaclustertop. " Global Declarations
include lzcaclusteruxx. " Function Modules

*******************************************************************
* User-defined Include-files (if necessary). *
*******************************************************************
include lzcaclusterlcl.

And here we are inside the include which has an issue;

class lcl_handler implementation.

method on_hotspot_click.
data: ld_value type zcafilename,
ld_row type lvc_s_row.
field-symbols: <row> type zcaclusterid.
sender->get_current_cell( importing e_value = ld_value es_row_id = ld_row ).

ex_file = ld_value.

...

endmethod.

endclass.

If I try to activate it, I get the following error;

Field "EX_FILE" is unknown.

I have tried activating the include by itself and I have tried activating everything together. I have tried deleting and readding the export parameters, but nothing seems to change this error. I have even tried forcing the activation but it short dumps when I try to run it.

entry.title: Inbound delivery needed for EWM or not?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new here, do we need to have inbound delivery (must) in embedded EWM S4 Hana?

I which cases, it is preferred to have an inbound delivery and in which cases not? for example syncronous goods movement. 

please suggest.

entry.title: Re: How to Create a Date Type Field in LMS
entry.content: This seems like a big miss on something that feels basic. We are in the same boat as the OP. You get promoted, your job entry date changes, and we can't use date operators to make a basic AP comparison because the field is a string..

entry.title: Re: Create SAP Build Apps applications in minutes with AI
entry.content:
@patrick_schad this is fantastic! Would you be able to share a subsequent blog that details how to enhance this generated output?

For example, how to rename the column headings or format date/currency output that may not be nicely formatted coming from the OData API output by itself?

entry.title: Settlement Management - Conditon Contract Validity in past
entry.content:
Creating a contract in the past and then attempting to run settlememt for delta accruals

Found that the pricing date is set to posting date which has to be in the open period and is outside of validity

We therefore get 0 accruals because the price conditions are not valid

Any ideas on how to correct other than changing price date determination which means we would need to create new settlement doc types because we have used standard

 

Tim

entry.title: [PLT-86245] - 1H 2025 Release - Monitoring Tool for IAS - LMS-IAS Integration support capabilities
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

I have the following question on the Enhancements to Monitoring Tool for Identity Authentication and Identity Provisioning [PLT-86245] feature delivered with the 1H 2025 release for the Partner Q&A session: 
- which capabilities does the monitoring tool provide for the LMS-IAS integration upgrade, esp. in the area of trouble shooting?

Kind regards

Roman

entry.title: Re: EC Promotion - Promote link in worksheet is not avail...
entry.content: @Rodrigo_Lopes What I meant is make sure FBP is set to Edit on all promotion related fields (Job Family, Job Code, Job Role and PayGrade)

entry.title: Re: Negative value not allowed for depreciation area 93
entry.content: Well, we have put all areas to allow negative values (where possible) in the app Manage Fixed Assets, but the error remains.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - upload files to SAP Document Management Service (DMS) repository with file pick
entry.content: Thanks @mingkho. Just to be clear: does it mean that if I build an app for my clients to upload and post us documents, they will have to upload the files one by one?

entry.title: Re: Create recurring pay component of same type using bus...
entry.content: It's an EC or integration question, not Compensation. @Sri_bs

entry.title: Re: Onb Emails
entry.content: Has anyone been able to add conditions within the HTML to have different branding dynamically appear based on the new hire's legal entity? If not, how have other teams solved for this requirement?

entry.title: Re: *****PAGE NUMBER WHILE EXPORTING TO PDF - SAP BO*****
entry.content:
Hi rohitsapbi
This behaviour is "by design" in BI 4.3 and previous versions.

1. What I did is name the reports as "Chaper 1", "Chapter 2" ... and in the footer cell use the functions ReportName() and Page().
For better vizualization of chapters in th PDF, you can also add spaces in report names to have bookmarks indentation.

2. Else, you can use a post-treatment software of pdf files to replace text inside the generated file.
For example, replace "###PageNumber###" with the real value.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Assertion Faileure 201503
entry.content:
There are no recent backups and we are looking to see if we have any older backups that are archived that don't have the corruption.
We have tried the -f but the issue still persists unfortunately.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Web Client Extension Not Showing
entry.content: I ran this command to check the permissions and it seems that the user b1service0 already has the valid permission 🤔

entry.title: Re: Inbound delivery needed for EWM or not?
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 ,

Is this only for Purchase Order ?

do we need to have inbound delivery (must) in embedded EWM S4 Hana? - No, Please see fantastic blog 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/synchronous-goods-receipts-in-ewm-for-external-procurement-po-based-with/ba-p/13515822 

"I which cases, it is preferred to have an inbound delivery and in which cases not? for example syncronous goods movement. " -> As per my experience, In case Advance Shipping Notification (ASN)  then you need inbound delivery otherwise not require if vendor/Supplier truck arrives without any notification. you can directly GR then create tasks for further Putaway...

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: 🚨 SAP Build Apps – Access Denied (403 Forbidden) – S...
entry.content:
Hello,

We are having the same problem in eu10 region. We were able to create new projects since few weeks ago, but now we get a 403 Forbidden.

May it be the same issue? How can we solve it?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 Public Cloud - Post Incoming Payment Integration
entry.content: Thanks Jeremy for quick response, actually we are looking for some automation and integration i.e. as soon as Sales Order and Billing created in system by fetching sale data from Point of Sale using Integration Suite, next action to post the payments also trigger through integration as there can be 10000s of order per day.

entry.title: Re: Settlement Management - Conditon Contract Validity in...
entry.content:
Hi @tim_parsons3, 

Thanks for your question. Based on your description, it sounds like there's a misunderstanding between the Pricing Date and Posting Date behavior in the delta accrual process. Let me clarify how standard SAP CCM handles this:

1. Delta Accruals and Pricing Date

In the standard configuration, delta accruals use the Final Settlement Date as the Pricing Date. This setting is defined in the Settlement Settings of the Condition Contract Type. So, even if you're creating the delta accrual retroactively, the pricing should still apply based on the last date of the contract validity period (or the last defined Final Settlement Date).

2. Why You're Seeing 0 Accruals

There are two common reasons for this:

  • You may have pricing conditions with limited validity that don’t cover the Final Settlement Date. If no valid pricing condition exists for that date, the system will calculate zero accrual.
  • If you have multiple pricing conditions (same key combination) for different time periods and want the accruals to reflect each rate within its valid time frame, then the standard logic won't split the calculation accordingly by default.

3. How to Handle This Requirement

If your business needs the system to apply different rates based on the validity periods of pricing conditions (rather than applying the rate valid only on the final date), then you'll need to adjust your configuration by enabling:
 "Split by Settlement Condition Validity"
This setting allows the system to split items by date ranges and apply the correct pricing condition for each corresponding business volume period.

4. About Posting Date

The Posting Date of the settlement document is determined at runtime during Settlement Execution. It's used for FI posting purposes only and has no influence on pricing or business volume selection.

 

To summarize:

  • Check your pricing condition validity—ensure it covers the Final Settlement Date.
  • If you need rate application to follow time-based validity, implement the split-by-validity logic.
  • You can still use standard document types; the key is to adjust your contract type configuration accordingly.

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Re: Contract deactivation in REFX if Asset has no postings

Roman

Paula

entry.title: Different Inbound Delivery Document Type for Different STO Doc Type?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

I am trying to see if I can configure different Inbound Delivery Document Types based on Different STO Doc Types.

For STO process, we are using the standard SPED output type to create the Inbound delivery automatically after O/B delivery PGI

We have 2 types of STOs, UB and ZUB based on different scenarios of STOs we do. Both currently have EL as the corresponding Inbound Delivery Document Type. Is it possible to have, say ZEL as the inbound delivery document type for ZUB only?

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:

This is better, not to impose TFA for Onboardees.

Can you thus share the configurations on how the TFA can be  exempted for Onboardees?

Best Regards

Ernest Lin

entry.title: How to activate downgrade protection & CSOL in Cloud ALM instead of options checks
entry.content:
How to activate downgrade protection & CSOL in Cloud ALM instead of options checks 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to activate downgrade protection & CSOL in Cloud...
entry.content:
It is only possible to perform transport checks on CTS managed systems, at this point.  No configuration at Cloud ALM level is possible to activate the checks.

Configuration is done on a system-by-system basis.  Follow the information found in: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/transport-checks 

FYI....There presently is no CSOL check in Cloud ALM -> only DGP and Cross Reference Checks.  (CSOL will come in future -> check SAP Road Map Explorer)

Best regards,

Technical Support

entry.title: Join Us: Innovate & Elevate - What's New in the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release Webinar
entry.content:
Join us for the upcoming Innovate & Elevate: What's New in the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release webinar, where we will dive into the exciting new features and innovations of the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release.

Webinar Details

  • Title: Innovate & Elevate: What's New in the May 2025 SAP Fieldglass Release 
  • Date: Tuesday, May 13, 2025
  • Time: 10AM Eastern Daylight Time / 4PM Central European Summer Time
  • Duration: 1 hour

Overview
The world of external workforce management is always evolving, and SAP Fieldglass is at the forefront of these transformations. This webinar is designed to keep you ahead of the curve by showcasing the latest updates and enhancements designed to streamline your processes, enhance user experiences, and boost operational efficiency.

How to Register
Click the link below to secure your spot:
Register Now

Once registration is complete, you will be sent an invitation to the webinar by email which can be added to your calendar.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Not Updating in BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content:
Good afternoon,
My name is Raquel Souza.
I am from Brazil.
I will try to help you.

Analyzing your question, I noticed that:

Your code seems well-structured, but the custom fields isdind and branch may not be updating for some common reasons when using BAPI_PO_CHANGE. Here are some checks and possible solutions:

1. Verify if the Fields are Enabled for Update

The custom fields in EKKO may need to be activated in CI_EKKODB (Custom Include for the EKKO table). Check with a functional consultant to confirm whether these fields have been correctly added and if updates via BAPI are allowed.

2. Use the Correct Field Names in BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER

If the custom fields isdind and branch were added via Append Structure in EKKO, you need to ensure that the correct names are used in the BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER structure.

Example:

DATA: bapi_te_po TYPE BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER,
bapi_te_pox TYPE BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADERX.

bapi_te_po-ZZISDIND = 'X'. " Check if the field name starts with 'ZZ'
bapi_te_po-ZZBRANCH = 'MAH'.

bapi_te_pox-ZZISDIND = 'X'.
bapi_te_pox-ZZBRANCH = 'X'.

If the actual field names in the EKKO table are different (e.g., ZZISDIND instead of ISDIND), adjust them in the code accordingly.

3. Correctly Populate the EXTENSIONIN Table

The BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER structure must be passed to the EXTENSIONIN table. In your code, the way ext_container is filled might be incorrect. Try the following approach:

DATA: ls_extensionin TYPE BAPIPAREX.

CLEAR: ls_extensionin.
ls_extensionin-STRUCTURE = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER'.
ls_extensionin-VALUEPART1 = bapi_te_po. " Ensure correct field assignment
APPEND ls_extensionin TO it_extension.

CLEAR: ls_extensionin.
ls_extensionin-STRUCTURE = 'BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADERX'.
ls_extensionin-VALUEPART1 = bapi_te_pox.
APPEND ls_extensionin TO it_extension.

If you need to use cl_abap_container_utilities=>fill_container_c(), ensure the offset is correct (+30 might be incorrect in some cases).

4. Check the BAPI Return Messages

After executing BAPI_PO_CHANGE, always check the return table to understand possible errors.

LOOP AT lt_return INTO DATA(ls_return).
WRITE: / ls_return-TYPE, ls_return-MESSAGE.
ENDLOOP.

If there is an error, share the returned message so we can analyze it.

5. Confirm the Update in the Database

After BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT, check directly in SAP if the fields were updated. You can use transaction SE16N to open the EKKO table and confirm the changes in the ISDIND and BRANCH fields.

If the fields are not updated, try adding:

WAIT UP TO 2 SECONDS.

Conclusion

✅ Verify if the fields were correctly added in EKKO.
✅ Ensure you are using the exact field names in BAPI_TE_MEPOHEADER.
✅ Correctly fill the EXTENSIONIN table.
✅ Check the BAPI return messages for errors.
✅ Confirm if the update was persisted in the database.

I hope this helps!
Good luck!!! 🚀

entry.title: Deprecation of Pixel Perfect Talent Card (PPTC)
entry.content:
In the release notes for the 1H 2025 upgrade we noticed that the Pixel Perfect Talent card was initially marked for deprecation. However, there was an announcement last week stating that the deprecation has been rolled back.

Do you have any insight on the reasons behind this decision. Additionally, could you please clarify until when we will have access to the Talent Card? We heavily rely on it in our company and are currently exploring alternative tools, but having a clear timeline would help us prepare and plan accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Select multiple values on a picklist in the job requi...
entry.content: thank you so much, is it possible in the job application template?

entry.title: Re: Unable to see destinations for BPA deployment
entry.content: Hi - were you able to resolve this? I get the same issue. I have all these 3 properties enabled on the destination.

entry.title: Re: Function module parameter not found
entry.content: A parameter is local to its procedure (as you can see: "Local Interface"), you can't use it directly in another procedure, pass it explicitly via parameters (or to avoid, transfer it to a global function group parameter).

entry.title: Re: Create SAP Build Apps applications in minutes with AI
entry.content: @patrick_schad : This is a great feature for SAP Build Apps. Could you please elaborate on how users would be able to track their AI usage of this feature. Also how would they calculate the cost of using this feature.

entry.title: SAP BTP Role with unrestricted attributes
entry.content:
Hello SAP CAP CDS Community,

I recently deployed in SAP BTP a CAP service with a role within xs-security.json with attribute having the setting "valueRequired": false in order to be created by default as unrestricted attribute.

According to the SAP Documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/application-security-descriptor-configuration-syntax#loio517895a9612241259d6941dbf9ad81cb__section_c1n_jfd_tkb in case of an unrestricted attribute the behavior should be the same as if the attribute would not exist for this role.

Unfourtunately, it is not the case. all the CUD operations are reporting 403 forbidden and only READ works and I can see all the entries in the list table.

In case that I specify that specific an static attribute value within the BTP role, than for the instances with that value everything works fine.

Do you experienced the same and maybe have a solution for me? Of course, on CAP service level, all entities are all annotated accordingly:

annotate...

{
        grant: ['*'],
        to   : ['DisassemblyManager'],
        where: 'name = $user.PlantGroup'
    }
Thanks in advance,
Catalin

entry.title: ABAP OOP Syntax help
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm having a problem accessing a table inside a method. I'm hoping someone can help formulate the correct syntax to accomplish this.

The scenario takes place after clicking on delete button of a custom class ALV. Through debug, I found only 1 variable (layout) accessible inside the method "Process_delete_records". I'd like to process the content of the table inside the method "Process_delete_records".

Here's the complete path of the table:

 

LAYOUT->FALV->CL_GUI_ALV_GRID_BASE->M_SELECTED_ROWS-ROW_ID

 

I attached some photos for your reference:

 

Hope someone can help me with this.

Thank you,

Geoff

entry.title: SoD without GRC Tool
entry.content:
Hi!

My question is a bit complex, is it possible for a company to create SoD risks without GRC tool?

I have an idea of how to have this, but I need help with ideas to automate this process and one north for starting this.

What comes to mind is to get a list of transactions that the functional/business area considers critical and define what cannot be with a single user, my point is how do I consolidate this by centralizing it in one place so that I can do simulations, for example of new access to a user and be able to identify if this can be assigned.

I know it sounds like an difficulty thing to do, but I want to at least try to have better risk control and be able to make improvements until the company acquires a GRC tool that does this type of work in an automated way.

entry.title: cannot validate mapping
entry.content:
Hello experts,

please, when trying to update mapping fields between ec and onboarding and validate, this error message appears:

entry.title: Re: SUM Prerequisite Check Extended: prepare for the real conversion run
entry.content:
Hi Boris,

I’m about to do a sandbox S/4 HANA upgrade (1909 to 2023) including a system move, so will be performing a homogeneous DMO. 

I’ve tried to run the extended pre-requisite checker on my source system, but it’s failing because the Linux version is too low (which I am aware of, but the target host has a more up-to-date Linux kernel). Initially, I’m able to ignore this error, but after the package checks, it flags the error up again, and won’t proceed any further. 
Is the extended pre-requisite checker not applicable in my situation?

entry.title: Not able to trigger the approval flow for supplier confirmation based on condition
entry.content:
Requirement: If there is a price variance in supplier confirmation compared to total value of PO (such as 5% increase+ $750 increase), then supplier confirmation needs to go in approval process. Once approved, then only it should update the PO value.

Analysis: We can add the condition in workflow but the data on which we need to do the calculation and find out the difference between the value of “supplier confirmation” and the value of “PO” is not possible. We are not getting the run time values in the BADI to perform the calculation.

Please suggest how to achieve this requirement. We are on S/4 HANA Public cloud.
